name: Follow-up Sequence

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Follow-up scheduled for 24h' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, message: 'Skipped — no email or not a lead' }) }}

notes: This workflow responds immediately to acknowledge receipt, then waits 24 hours before sending a follow-up email. The 'Send Follow-up Email' node POSTs to your backend's email-send endpoint — update the URL to your actual backend. Alternatively, replace the HTTP node with an SMTP/Gmail node and add credentials directly in n8n. To change the wait time, edit the 'Wait 24 Hours' node.
